programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a grueling 13-hour mission in 1943.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: Allies face resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line as they push into Italy. One of these locations is the ancient monastery, Monte Cassino.

programmes.show_name: Battle of Britain: 3 Days that Saved the Nation
programmes.show_description: Dan Snow and Kate Humble relive three days which changed the course of history. The 15th August 1940, the day when the Battle of Britain started in earnest.  (Ep 1/3)

programmes.show_name: Battle of Britain: The Longest Day
programmes.show_description: Dan Snow and Kate Humble relive three days which changed history. The 30th August 1940 - the RAF and Fighter Command experience the most intense day of fighting. (Ep 2/3)

programmes.show_name: Battle of Britain: Our Finest Hour
programmes.show_description: Three days which changed the course of history. The 15th September 1940 - Battle of Britain day, when the RAF fought to stop Hitler's plans to invade Britain. (Ep 3/3)
